meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [2.0.1] - 2025-10-09

### Changed

- fixed modelling error which prevented the successfull validation of the payload

## [2.0.0] - 2023-08-28

### Added

- added new properties: partGeometry (represting the side a part belongs to, e.g. left or right) and manufacturerId (BPN of the manufacturer)


### Changed

- rename property catenaXId to assetId to accomodate ongoing discussion
- adjust examle value of CatenaXIdTrait to a valid random uuid value
- adjusted bamm meta model to samm meta model since it samm is default since 07.07.2023

### Removed

- removed unused property since it is already defined by samm-characteristics

## [1.0.0] - 2023-06-30

### Added

- added new properties: createdOn, lastModifiedOn

### Changed

- changed model name from BomAsSpecified to SingleLevelBomAsSpecified for consistency reasons with other Bom models
- moved new model to a new namespace
- changed existing properties: identifier -> catenaXId, item -> childParts
- minor adjustments of exemplary values to reflect current state of the model

### Removed

- removed non-needed properties: index, quantity

nodes.label: SingleLevelBomAsSpecified
nodes.description: The SingleLevelBomAsSpecified defines the view of the OEM or producer of the whole product, e.g. the OEM of a vehicle. It is free of any supplier-related information and specifies the promised and guaranteed content of the whole product to the end customer. This "top-down" view is in contrast to the "bottom-up" view of the SingleLevelBoMAsPlanned, though several sub-aspects are shared. The BomAsSpecified is merely one aspect, which is attached to the twin of the whole product and itself does neither introduce further twins nor reference them. Instead it merely comprises all functional information required by dismantlers, workshops or requestors for used parts to search for and to make a match on the market place.

nodes.label: assetId
nodes.description: A unique reference to an asset which could be registered within Catena-X DataSpace

nodes.label: manufacturerId
nodes.description: The ID of the initial issuer of the single level BoMAsSpecified

nodes.label: childassetId
nodes.description: Describes the Catena-X ID of the child part

nodes.label: lastModifiedOn
nodes.description: The time the item was modified the last time

nodes.label: createdOn
nodes.description: The time the item was created on

nodes.label: measurementUnit
nodes.description: Unit of measurement for the quantity of serialized objects.

nodes.label: quantityNumber
nodes.description: The number of objects related to the measurement unit.

nodes.label: key
nodes.description: Key within the classification.

nodes.label: value
nodes.description: Value within the classification.

nodes.label: childItems
nodes.description: The child Items of the observed parent item

nodes.label: item
nodes.description: The description of the part in the primary language of the production facility of the product owner.

nodes.label: ownerItemId
nodes.description: This is the key field of the component which usually keeps the part numbers used in after-sales, e.g. when repairing broken parts and searching for a replacement. This ownerPartId itself isn't usually bound to one part version, with the assumption that all part versions with the same ownerPartId are mutually interchangeable.

nodes.label: itemVersion
nodes.description: This is the version of the item. The engineering will at times supercede an older item version by a newer one, which might have different material aspects, physical dimensions etc., still maintaining compatibility.

nodes.label: itemQuantity
nodes.description: This is the quantity how often this item is in the item.

nodes.label: itemDescription
nodes.description: The description of the item in the primary language of the production facility of the product owner.

nodes.label: itemClassification
nodes.description: The item classification.

nodes.label: childItemCategory
nodes.description: The BomAsSpecified defines the view of the OEM or producer of the whole product, e.g. the OEM of a vehicle. It is free of any supplier-related information and specifies the promised and guaranteed content of the whole product to the end customer. This "top-down" view is in contrast to the "bottom-up" view of the SingleLevelBoMAsPlanned, though several sub-aspects are shared. The BomAsSpecified is merely one aspect, which is attached to the twin of the whole product and itself does neither introduce further twins nor reference them. Instead it merely comprises all functional information required by dismantlers, workshops or requestors for used parts to search for and to make a match on the market place.

nodes.label: itemPositioning
nodes.description: Some parts are intended to be used on either the left or right side, e.g. mirrors, hence this entity describes on which side a part is to be used

nodes.label: Uuidv4RegularExpression
nodes.description: The provided regular expression ensures that the UUID is composed of five groups of characters separated by hyphens, in the form 8-4-4-4-12 for a total of 36 characters (32 hexadecimal characters and 4 hyphens).

nodes.label: NumberOfObjects
nodes.description: Quantifiable number of objects in reference to the measurementUnit.

nodes.label: ItemQuantityCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the item quantity.

nodes.label: ChildItemCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the child item property

nodes.label: ItemCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic of the item.

nodes.label: ItemClassificationCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the item classification.

nodes.label: ChildItemEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulates the properties describing the child item

nodes.label: ItemEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the properies describing a item

nodes.label: ItemQuantityEntity
nodes.description: The entity encapsulating the properties describing the quantity of a item.

nodes.label: ItemClassificationEntity
nodes.description: The entity encapsulating the properties of the item classification.

nodes.label: ItemPositioningCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes the characteristic of the left or right mark entity with its possible values (left or right)
